questionHtml:
What is the number of hydrogen atoms in 2.00 moles of Ca(HCO3)2?

Avogadro’s constant, L or NA: 6.02 × 1023 mol−1

A.  2.00

B.  4.00

C.  1.20 × 1024

D.  2.41 × 1024
